title: Magical Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful North African-inspired stew made with tender lamb and a blend of aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at local Middle Eastern market

instructions: Heat oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic, ginger, and preserved lemon; cook for 1 minute.
Add tagine spice blend; stir to combine.
Add water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until lamb is tender.
Add olives and roasted peppers; simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional olives and preserved lemon, if desired.
